---
title: "Paired comparison of pooled vs individual Xpert against culture"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, readxl, rlang, here, officer, flextable, writexl)
source(here::here("Scripts","0.functions.R"))
```

```{r import recode}
master <- readRDS(here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","master_clean.rds"))

# Recode xpert
master <- recode_xpert_pool_results(master,
                                    xpert_result_col = "Xpert_result",
                                    pool_result_col  = "pool_resultt",
                                    xpert_trace = c("as_pos"),
                                    pool_trace  = c("as_pos_xpert"))


# Fixing poolsize formatting
master <- master %>%
  mutate(poolsize = factor(poolsize, levels = c(2L, 3L, 4L))
         )

# Harmonized master df 
# Make it coherent with STARD by removing all invalid pools
# remove all pools with NA
# keeping only valid (pos,neg) results to achieve consistent denominator
masterH <- master %>%
  filter(!is.na(pooling)) %>%
   filter(
    xpert %in% c("pos", "neg"),
    pooling %in% c("pos", "neg"),
    culture %in% c("pos", "neg")
  )
```

```{r}
# Set this to the dataframe. Only doing this for primary analysis harmonized dataset now
data_in <- masterH

# Required variables in data_in:
#   xpert   : "pos"/"neg"
#   pooling : "pos"/"neg"
#   culture : "pos"/"neg"
#   poolno  : pool identifier for cluster inference

# Subgroup specifications (aligned to performance.Rmd)
grp_specs <- list(
  Performance             = NULL,
  Country                 = "Country_Name",
  Setting                 = "settingACF",
  HIV                     = "hiv_status_short",
  PoolSize                = "poolsize"
  # ,
  # PoolSizeCountry         = c("Country_Name","poolsize"),
  # PoolSizeCountrySetting  = c("Country_Name","poolsize","settingACF")
)

# Settings
n_boot      <- 2000
seed        <- 1209
B_signflip  <- 100000  # pool-level sign-flip randomization test replicates
```

# Functions

```{r}
.clean_binary <- function(x, pos = "pos", neg = "neg") {
  dplyr::if_else(x %in% c(pos, neg), x, NA_character_)
}

.safe_binom_mcnemar <- function(b, c) {
  # exact McNemar = binomial test on discordant pairs
  if (is.na(b) || is.na(c) || (b + c) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  stats::binom.test(x = b, n = b + c, p = 0.5, alternative = "two.sided")$p.value
}

.pool_signflip_p <- function(dat, culture_value = c("pos","neg"), stat = c("sens","spec"),
                             B = 100000, seed = 1) {
  culture_value <- match.arg(culture_value)
  stat <- match.arg(stat)

  d <- dat %>%
    filter(
      culture == culture_value,
      xpert   %in% c("pos","neg"),
      pooling %in% c("pos","neg"),
      !is.na(poolno)
    ) %>%
    mutate(di = case_when(
      stat == "sens" & pooling == "pos" & xpert == "neg" ~  1L,
      stat == "sens" & pooling == "neg" & xpert == "pos" ~ -1L,
      stat == "spec" & pooling == "neg" & xpert == "pos" ~  1L,
      stat == "spec" & pooling == "pos" & xpert == "neg" ~ -1L,
      TRUE ~ 0L
    ))

  if (nrow(d) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  n <- nrow(d)
  pool_sums <- d %>% group_by(poolno) %>% summarise(Dg = sum(di), .groups = "drop")

  T_obs <- mean(d$di)

  if (all(pool_sums$Dg == 0)) return(NA_real_)

  set.seed(seed)
  G <- nrow(pool_sums)
  T_star <- replicate(B, {
    s <- sample(c(-1L, 1L), size = G, replace = TRUE)
    sum(s * pool_sums$Dg) / n
  })

  # Monte Carlo p-value with +1 correction
  (sum(abs(T_star) >= abs(T_obs)) + 1) / (B + 1)
}

.cluster_boot_ci_diff <- function(dat, culture_value = c("pos","neg"), stat = c("sens","spec"),
                                  n_boot = 2000, seed = 1) {
  culture_value <- match.arg(culture_value)
  stat <- match.arg(stat)

  d <- dat %>%
    filter(
      culture == culture_value,
      xpert   %in% c("pos","neg"),
      pooling %in% c("pos","neg"),
      !is.na(poolno)
    )

  if (nrow(d) == 0) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))

  pools <- unique(d$poolno)
  if (length(pools) == 0) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))

  set.seed(seed)
  boot_diffs <- replicate(n_boot, {
    samp_pools <- sample(pools, size = length(pools), replace = TRUE)

    dd <- d %>%
      semi_join(tibble(poolno = samp_pools), by = "poolno") %>%
      left_join(tibble(poolno = samp_pools, .rep = seq_along(samp_pools)), by = "poolno") %>%
      mutate(poolno_boot = paste0(poolno, "_", .rep))

    if (stat == "sens") {
      bb <- sum(dd$pooling == "pos" & dd$xpert == "neg")
      cc <- sum(dd$pooling == "neg" & dd$xpert == "pos")
      (bb - cc) / nrow(dd)
    } else {
      bb <- sum(dd$pooling == "pos" & dd$xpert == "neg")
      cc <- sum(dd$pooling == "neg" & dd$xpert == "pos")
      (cc - bb) / nrow(dd)
    }
  })

  stats::quantile(boot_diffs, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)
}

.compute_one <- function(dat, label = "Overall",
                         n_boot = 2000, seed = 1, B_signflip = 100000) {

  d <- dat %>%
    transmute(
      poolno  = poolno,
      culture = .clean_binary(culture),
      xpert   = .clean_binary(xpert),
      pooling = .clean_binary(pooling)
    )

  out <- tibble(
    stratum = label,
    n_total = nrow(d),
    n_culture_pos = sum(d$culture == "pos", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_culture_neg = sum(d$culture == "neg", na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  # sensitivity
  d_pos <- d %>% filter(culture == "pos", xpert %in% c("pos","neg"), pooling %in% c("pos","neg"))
  if (nrow(d_pos) == 0) {
    sens_pool <- sens_xp <- diff_sens <- NA_real_
    b_sens <- c_sens <- NA_integer_
    p_mcn_sens <- p_sf_sens <- NA_real_
    ci_sens <- c(NA_real_, NA_real_)
  } else {
    sens_pool <- mean(d_pos$pooling == "pos")
    sens_xp   <- mean(d_pos$xpert   == "pos")
    b_sens <- sum(d_pos$pooling == "pos" & d_pos$xpert == "neg")
    c_sens <- sum(d_pos$pooling == "neg" & d_pos$xpert == "pos")
    diff_sens <- (b_sens - c_sens) / nrow(d_pos)
    p_mcn_sens <- .safe_binom_mcnemar(b_sens, c_sens)
    p_sf_sens  <- .pool_signflip_p(d, culture_value = "pos", stat = "sens", B = B_signflip, seed = seed)
    ci_sens    <- .cluster_boot_ci_diff(d, culture_value = "pos", stat = "sens", n_boot = n_boot, seed = seed)
  }

  # specificity
  d_neg <- d %>% filter(culture == "neg", xpert %in% c("pos","neg"), pooling %in% c("pos","neg"))
  if (nrow(d_neg) == 0) {
    spec_pool <- spec_xp <- diff_spec <- NA_real_
    b_spec <- c_spec <- NA_integer_
    p_mcn_spec <- p_sf_spec <- NA_real_
    ci_spec <- c(NA_real_, NA_real_)
  } else {
    spec_pool <- mean(d_neg$pooling == "neg")
    spec_xp   <- mean(d_neg$xpert   == "neg")
    b_spec <- sum(d_neg$pooling == "pos" & d_neg$xpert == "neg")
    c_spec <- sum(d_neg$pooling == "neg" & d_neg$xpert == "pos")
    diff_spec <- (c_spec - b_spec) / nrow(d_neg)
    p_mcn_spec <- .safe_binom_mcnemar(b_spec, c_spec)
    p_sf_spec  <- .pool_signflip_p(d, culture_value = "neg", stat = "spec", B = B_signflip, seed = seed)
    ci_spec    <- .cluster_boot_ci_diff(d, culture_value = "neg", stat = "spec", n_boot = n_boot, seed = seed)
  }

  out %>%
    mutate(
      sens_pooling = sens_pool,
      sens_xpert   = sens_xp,
      spec_pooling = spec_pool,
      spec_xpert   = spec_xp,

      diff_sens_pool_minus_xpert = diff_sens,
      diff_sens_ciL = ci_sens[1],
      diff_sens_ciH = ci_sens[2],

      diff_spec_pool_minus_xpert = diff_spec,
      diff_spec_ciL = ci_spec[1],
      diff_spec_ciH = ci_spec[2],

      b_sens_pool_pos_xpert_neg = b_sens,
      c_sens_pool_neg_xpert_pos = c_sens,
      b_spec_pool_pos_xpert_neg = b_spec,
      c_spec_pool_neg_xpert_pos = c_spec,

      mcnemar_p_sens = p_mcn_sens,
      mcnemar_p_spec = p_mcn_spec,

      pool_level_signflip_p_sens = p_sf_sens,
      pool_level_signflip_p_spec = p_sf_spec
    )
}

.run_by_group <- function(dat, grouping_vars = NULL,
                          n_boot = 2000, seed = 1, B_signflip = 100000) {

  if (is.null(grouping_vars)) {
    return(.compute_one(dat, label = "Overall", n_boot = n_boot, seed = seed, B_signflip = B_signflip))
  }

  gv <- grouping_vars
  dat %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(gv))) %>%
    group_modify(~{
      lab <- paste(paste(gv, as.character(.y[1, gv, drop = TRUE]), sep = "="), collapse = "; ")
      .compute_one(.x, label = lab, n_boot = n_boot, seed = seed, B_signflip = B_signflip)
    }) %>%
    ungroup()
}
```

# Run analyses

```{r}
out_dir   <- here("Outputs","Performance","PairedComparisons")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

res_list <- imap(grp_specs, ~{
  .run_by_group(
    dat = data_in,
    grouping_vars = .x,
    n_boot = n_boot,
    seed = seed,
    B_signflip = B_signflip
  )
})

# Save outputs
iwalk(res_list, ~{
  nm <- .y
  rr <- .x
  readr::write_csv(rr, file.path(out_dir, paste0("paired_compare_", nm, ".csv")))
  # saveRDS(rr, file.path(out_dir, paste0("paired_compare_", nm, ".rds")))
})
```

```{r}
res_list$Performance %>% print(n = 50)
```
